---
title: "test_lease_manager_empire.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\unit\test_lease_manager_empire.py"
loc: 31
complexity: 1
logic_score: 5.72
style_score: 3.77
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.81
---

## Intent
The `test_lease_manager_empire.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on temp_lease_manager, test_acquire_and_release_lease, test_lease_renewal, test_lease_expiration. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via temp_lease_manager, test_acquire_and_release_lease, test_lease_renewal, test_lease_expiration. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 5.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pytest](file://pytest)
- [sqlite3](file://sqlite3)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.lease_manager](file://src.core.lease_manager)

### Exports
- `temp_lease_manager`
- `test_acquire_and_release_lease`
- `test_lease_renewal`
- `test_lease_expiration`
